purpose: Canonical AgentPay Labs experiment queue. Experiments are proposals until evaluated, approved, and archived.

experiments.hypothesis: A founder-approved MCP billing gateway pitch to MCP builders will produce more qualified replies than generic AgentPay positioning.
experiments.rollback_rule: Discard packet if it lacks a named recipient, proof claim, follow-up date, or founder approval status.
experiments.expected_artifact: send-ready outbound packet staged for founder approval

experiments.hypothesis: A revenue packet with buyer, amount, due date, next step, and payment path will expose faster first-cash opportunities than broad GTM notes.
experiments.rollback_rule: Discard packet if amount, owner, due date, or next follow-up is missing.
experiments.expected_artifact: collection or first-cash packet staged for founder review

experiments.hypothesis: Treating OpenAI and Anthropic as distribution partners will clarify the fastest platform submission path for AgentPay Labs.
experiments.rollback_rule: Discard packet if it does not list exact platform requirement gaps and the next owner/date.
